case_title: ROSALIND NG VS. LEVY, SHIRLEY E., EXECUTOR OF THE ESTATE OF et al

docket_entries.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AND REPLY DECLARATION OF ROBERT PADWAY IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO EXPUNGE INTEREST IN REAL ESTATE HOLDINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, ROSALIND

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ROSALIND NG'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF INTEREST IN REAL ESTATE HOLDINGS AND RELATED DOCUMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 8, 2013, TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY RELATED DISPUTES. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE AND DEPT CHANGE FOR HEARING OF MTN TO EXPUNGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, ROSALIND
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-08-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF ROSALIND NG NOTICE OF MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF INTEREST IN REAL ESTATE HOLDINGS AND RELATED DOCUMENT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT CCP 405.23 ET SEQ. IS APPLICABLE UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS CASE. AUGUST 20, 2003 ORDER IS VALID ON ITS FACE AND RECORDED PURSUANT TO PC 7263. NO EVIDENCE TO THE CONTRARY IS PRESENTED TO THE COURT, I.E. THAT TRUST DOES NOT HAVE A 54% INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY PURSUANT TO AUGUST 20, 2003 ORDER AS INDICATED IN DOCUMENTS RECORDED ON AUGUST 22, 2003 AND OCTOBER 25, 2011. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS LEVY AND SHIRLEY E.'S, MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES UNDER CCP SEC 405.38 IS GRANTED IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $20,255 AS FOLLOWS: WATKINS 5.8 HOURS AT $425; WEISS 51.9 HOURS AT $300; BYRNE 3.4 HOURS AT $300; LEVY 4 HOURS AT $300. NO FEES FOR TODD ROBIE. ROBIE'S DECLARATION DOES NOT SPECIFY HOURS, IF ANY SPENT ON "MAKING OR OPPOSING MOTION." CCP 405.38. RECOVERY FOR FIRST APPEARANCE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO INCLUDE IT IN THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS, IF AND WHEN DEFENDANT PREVAILS IN THE MATTER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees Under Ccp Sec 405.38
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows with a modification: DEFENDANTS LEVY and SHIRLEY E.'s, Motion For Attorneys Fees Under Ccp Sec 405.38 is GRANTED in the total amount of $20,255 as follows: Watkins 5.8 hours at $425; Weiss 51.9 hours at $300; Byrne 3.4 hours at $300; Levy 4 hours at $300. No fees for Todd Robie. Robie's declaration does not specify hours, if any spent on "making or opposing motion." CCP 405.38. recovery for first appearance is denied without prejudice to include it in the Memorandum of Costs, if and when Defendant prevails in the matter. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Interest In Real Estate Holdings And Related Document
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Robert Alan Padway of Bryan Cave LLP (415)675-3400, moving party/ Erik P. Weiss of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (415)788-1900 for Defendant Levy Estate

Argued;Tentative ruling adopted as follows:PLAINTIFF ROSALIND NG Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Interest In Real Estate Holdings And Related Document is DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that CCP 405.23 et seq. is applicable under the circumstances of this case. August 20, 2003 order is valid on its face and recorded pursuant to PC 7263. No evidence to the contrary is presented to the Court, i.e. that Trust does not have a 54% interest in the property pursuant to August 20, 2003 order as indicated in documents recorded on August 22, 2003 and October 25, 2011. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Notice Of Interest In Real Estate Holdings And Related Document
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ROSALIND NG'S Motion To Expunge Notice Of Interest In Real Estate Holdings And Related Document is continued to October 8, 2013, to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property related disputes. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
